> Official Temporal multi-SDK skill for long-running durable execution. Complements local `event-driven-architect` with implementation depth.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add temporalio/skill-temporal-developer --skill temporal-developer -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/temporal-developer`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed Wave 7 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/temporal-developer.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run external-skill-auditor before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

Official Temporal multi-SDK skill for building durable, long-running workflows and activities with Temporal. Complements local event-driven-architect skill. Evidence gathered from upstream SKILL.md, READMEs, and repo structure via web research.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add temporalio/skill-temporal-developer --skill temporal-developer -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```
